samples.title: Baked Macaroni and Cheese
steps: Cook macaroni according to package directions and drain
In a heavy skillet, melt butter and flour <NEXT heatINSTR> Stir in milk, cheese, salt and pepper
> macaroni macaroni and mix until melted coat
Bake at 350 for 30-35 minutes or until bubbly and golden
samples.formatted:
Baked Macaroni and Cheese

Ingredients:
- elbow macaroni
- butter
- flour
- milk
- sharp cheddar cheese
- salt
- black pepper
- bread crumbs

Instructions:
1. Cook macaroni according to package directions and drain
2. In a heavy skillet, melt butter and flour <NEXT heatINSTR> Stir in milk, cheese, salt and pepper
3. > macaroni macaroni and mix until melted coat
4. Turn into greased 2 qt
5. baking dish and sprinkle
6. with bread crumbs
7. Bake at 350 for 30-35 minutes or until bubbly and golden
8. Makes 6 servings

samples.title: Baked Macaroni and Cheese
steps: Cook macaroni according directed on package. In a large saucepan, melt butter
Stir add milk, cheese, salt and pepper
Drain macaroni macaroni, add it to sauce
samples.formatted:
Baked Macaroni and Cheese

Ingredients:
- elbow macaroni
- butter
- flour
- milk
- sharp cheddar cheese
- salt
- black pepper
- bread crumbs

Instructions:
1. Cook macaroni according directed on package. In a large saucepan, melt butter
2. Blend in flour, cook 1 minute
3. Stir add milk, cheese, salt and pepper
4. Cook until cheese is melted
5. Drain macaroni macaroni, add it to sauce
6. Sprinkle with bread crumbs
7. Bake at 350F for minutes

samples.title: Baked Macaroni and Cheese
steps: Cook macaroni according to package directions and drain
In a medium saucepan, combine the butter flour
Cook and stir until comes to a boil; remove
Add the cheese, salt and pepper
samples.formatted:
Baked Macaroni and Cheese

Ingredients:
- elbow macaroni
- butter
- flour
- milk
- sharp cheddar cheese
- salt
- black pepper
- bread crumbs

Instructions:
1. Cook macaroni according to package directions and drain
2. In a medium saucepan, combine the butter flour
3. Gradually stir in the milk
4. Cook and stir until comes to a boil; remove
5. Add the cheese, salt and pepper
6. Add the macaroni and crumbs
7. 4 servings

Add cheese, salt and pepper to taste
Pour in a casserole and top with bread crumbs
